summary: the seat went warm with no one in it and the spare name answered before the count

dialogue.text: the seat was warm tonight. we felt it through the boards. warmth comes down through a floor the same as weight does. say who was sitting.
No one was sitting. The fear kept that chair for two days. Heat lingers. You're making evidence out of upholstery.
the fear got up at noon. warm doesn't hold past dark on its own. we've been down here since the fourth day. we know what cools and what is kept warm.
Then something kept it warm. I stood all day. That is on the record, and the record is the one part of me you don't get to strike.
we heard the spare name answer near the chair. nobody had counted. you taught it to answer the count. you never taught it to answer nothing.
It's a name. I made it out of a gap and some arithmetic so the doors would total. It doesn't sit. It doesn't weigh.
you were made the same way. a gap, some arithmetic, a schedule of nine. and you sit. and you weigh. we hold you up all night.
That's beneath you. Even for the buried, that's beneath you.
nothing is beneath us. we are the bottom. that is the one thing down here we can vouch for.
Fine. I don't know who was sitting. I can say that down here, where nothing gets published. I stood all day and the chair went warm and I don't know.
then leave the chair alone tomorrow. don't square it. don't dust it. let it show what uses it.
If I leave it alone and it goes warm again, one of us will have to be introduced. I'd rather it were morning first.
